reviews.name: accounts/101903959883225846530/locations/10358376386456800675/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNJbzVuVUpREAE

reviews.comment:
I bought my custom bed from them back in 2022, and I’ve been very happy with it ever since. It’s incredibly durable, still sturdy to this day, and the craftsmanship really shows. I’ve even recommended them to friends—my best friend ended up buying the same bed because of how impressed I was with mine.

The only feedback I have is about the after-sales experience. I was hoping to have the bed reupholstered by the same team, mainly because I trust the people who built it to maintain the quality and integrity of their own furniture. After reaching out a few times, though, I got the impression that reupholstery work may not be something they currently prioritize.

I’m not sure if they’ve had changes in their administration or process, but I remember them being more accommodating before. This is just something I hope they can improve, because the quality of their furniture is excellent, and strong after-sales support would make the overall experience even better.

reviews.comment: The quality of their products is top-notch, especially for the price. They just need to improve their customer response time. Though it’s understandable that they’re dealing with an influx of inquiries, I think hiring more page managers would really help.

reviews.comment:
Thanks to Pan Furniture!
Got my customized bed that is so durable and looks good with my room's interior!

Great customer service and excellent product!

reviewReply.comment:
Thank you so much for the kind words! We are thrilled to hear that your customized bed fits perfectly with your room’s interior. 🏠✨

Our delivery and installation team will be so happy to hear your feedback. They take great pride in making sure everything is set up just right. We hope you enjoy many years of comfort and durability with your new piece. Happy lounging!

reviews.name: accounts/101903959883225846530/locations/10358376386456800675/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25SQ05VRlZObWcwUkdkNVNETkpXa3AyYTNWVE9WRRAB

reviews.comment:
We recently bought two bed frames from your store, and we’re very pleased with our purchase!

Quality & Construction
The frames feel sturdy and well-built, with solid materials that don’t squeak or wobble even with regular use. The finish is smooth and looks exactly as shown on your website.

Value
Compared to other options we looked at, these frames offer great value for money. They provide excellent support for our mattresses and have enough under-bed storage space to keep our bedroom tidy.

The delivery was also on time, and the staff we spoke with when placing our order were friendly and helpful. We’d definitely recommend these bed frames to family and friends!

reviewReply.comment:
Thank you so much for your kind review! We’re very happy to hear that you’re pleased with your new bed frames.

We always aim to provide sturdy, high-quality furniture that offers great value, so it’s wonderful to know that the frames met your expectations in terms of durability, design, and functionality.

We also appreciate your kind words about our team and delivery service. Your recommendation means a lot to us.

Thank you for choosing us, and we hope to serve you again in the future!

reviews.name: accounts/101903959883225846530/locations/10358376386456800675/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xwdFNGWTJNelZSWkhGSFpuUkljekZxYkhkTFMzYxAB

reviews.comment: Responsive, good quality, reasonable price. Shout out to Ms. Aina!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much for your kind words! We’re glad you’re happy with the quality, price, and service. We truly appreciate your support! 😊

reviews.name: accounts/101903959883225846530/locations/10358376386456800675/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25CS09IWTVjRUYyT0hsZlNURlFVRmRSWTNnNVZVRRAB

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much for the 5-star rating! ✨ We are so glad you are happy with your PAN Furniture piece. If you ever have photos of your new setup, we would love to see them! Looking forward to serving you again soon.

reviews.comment:
The quality of the products met expectations—what is shown in the ads accurately reflects how they look in person. The furniture is visually pleasing, and the delivery team handled the items carefully and remained courteous throughout the process.

However, communication through the online messenger needs significant improvement. Order updates and requests were not provided unless we followed up, and our delivery was cancelled or rescheduled twice without clear explanation. The first cancellation was not communicated to us at all, and even on the final delivery day, no update was given until I personally reached out to one of the delivery personnel, who was helpful and responsive despite not being assigned to our delivery.

While I would still recommend the good quality of your products, client inquiries should be handled more attentively and proactively. A business is not defined solely by how well its products are advertised, but also by the consistency, clarity, and professionalism shown in how customers are treated.

reviewReply.comment:
Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback. We’re glad to hear that the furniture met your expectations and that the quality and appearance matched what was shown in our ads. We also appreciate your kind words about our delivery team and their careful handling of the items.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced with the communication and delivery updates. This is not the level of service we aim to provide, and your feedback helps us identify areas where we need to improve. We understand how important timely updates and clear communication are, especially when it comes to delivery schedules.

Rest assured that we will review this with our team to ensure better coordination and more proactive communication moving forward.

Thank you again for your honest feedback and for still recommending the quality of our products. We truly appreciate your support and the opportunity to improve our service.

reviews.comment: Bed is so beautiful and look so elegant, money wise and very reliable company. Easy to talk with. Highly recommended to family and friends. I will update you with photo when everything is on place. Thank you so much! 🥳

reviewReply.comment:
Thank you so much for your kind words! We’re very happy to hear that you love the bed and that you found it elegant and worth the price.

We truly appreciate your trust in our company and your recommendation to family and friends. It means a lot to us!

We’d also love to see the photos once everything is in place. Thank you again for choosing us! 🥳
